_note: Declared feed sources for ingestion. This list is intentionally Washington Post-only for the current source-by-source rollout. Live fetching is gated by env TEMPO_RSS_INGESTION (values: 'live' | 'fixture'; defaults to 'live' when NODE_ENV=production, else 'fixture'). When set to 'live', feed-reader.mjs fetches every eligible row (kind=rss, active=true, valid http(s) url) and applies caps via TEMPO_RSS_MAX_ITEMS_PER_FEED (default 30) and TEMPO_RSS_MAX_ITEMS_TOTAL (default 200). Optional publisher filter via TEMPO_RSS_PUBLISHER (case-insensitive substring match on feed name). Operators may add/replace rows here for local dev; production reads from the Supabase manifest when isSupabaseEnabled().
